ops.body: 2026-07-19: the E10.B/golden lane is BUILT and the packet is AUTHORED — awaiting the human labeling session. Shipped d94b74b0 (after opus finder/refuter review + one MEDIUM fix: the packet's negative draw is now floored at the packet stratum so a warranted-heavy future frame can't starve it): cc_steer/retrain/golden.py (audit_pools/audit_sample one deterministic draw; author_packet with byte-identical tails, hash-safe manifest edits, refuse-on-existing-labels, mandatory round-trip replay of judged.py's _packet_contexts binding), cc_steer/retrain/audit.py (run_warrant_audit seeds (1729,2718), corrected labels WIN×2/LOSS×2/split→uncertain, sha-stamped sidecar eval/audit/warrant-audit-v1.json, Wilson CIs + paired AUC via promotion.journal('watcher-warrant-audit')), CLI group `cc-steer golden author|verify|audit`. Packet authored at ~/.cc-steer/eval/golden/watcher-fires/ against incumbent v002-20260718-cdfabf2f3a48: 30 rows (15 warranted + 15 negative nested in the 200-row audit sample: 79 warranted take-all / 9 fired / 72 rank-stratified negatives / 40 other-positive), gate 24/30, round-trip verified. NEXT: human fills labels_template.json → saves as labels.json (README.md carries the blindness protocol; ~2h) → `cc-steer golden verify` → judged gate unblocked → `cc-steer golden audit` (~446 calls, approved) → CIs + paired-AUC verdict close criterion 3ab8890c.
